patterns.name: Head and Shoulders
patterns.description: A reversal pattern that signals a trend change from bullish to bearish.

patterns.name: Double Top
patterns.description: Two peaks at approximately the same price level, indicating a bearish reversal.

patterns.name: Double Bottom
patterns.description: Two troughs at similar price levels, suggesting a bullish reversal.

patterns.name: Cup and Handle
patterns.description: A bullish continuation pattern with a rounded bottom and slight pullback.

patterns.name: Inverse Head and Shoulders
patterns.description: A bullish reversal pattern indicating an uptrend.

patterns.name: Triple Top
patterns.description: Three peaks at similar levels signaling strong resistance.

patterns.name: Ascending Triangle
patterns.description: A bullish pattern with horizontal resistance and rising support.

patterns.name: Descending Triangle
patterns.description: A bearish pattern with horizontal support and declining resistance.

strategies.name: Moving Average Crossover
strategies.description: Simple strategy using two moving averages to identify trend changes.

strategies.name: Support and Resistance
strategies.description: Trade bounces off key price levels where buyers and sellers meet.

strategies.name: Breakout Trading
strategies.description: Enter positions when price breaks through significant price levels.

strategies.name: Fibonacci Retracement
strategies.description: Use mathematical ratios to predict support and resistance levels.

strategies.name: Elliott Wave Theory
strategies.description: Identify repeating wave patterns in market psychology.

strategies.name: Ichimoku Cloud
strategies.description: Comprehensive indicator showing support, resistance, and momentum.

strategies.name: MACD Divergence
strategies.description: Spot trend reversals using momentum divergence.

strategies.name: Volume Profile Analysis
strategies.description: Understand price action through volume distribution.
